title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Taj SATS

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Taj SATS
jsonLd.description:
We at Taj SATS are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Taj SATS:
Taj SATS is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj SATS!
